'''''Ojai''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The ''Ojai'' was sent, along with the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]'' to [[Attack on the Phoenix|rendezvous]] with the stolen [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Phoenix (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Phoenix'']] in a quiet area, away from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] interests in order to recover some stolen [[communications satellite]]s. It arrived just as [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] finished clearing the area of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] launched during a surprise attack by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']]. The ''Intrepid'' fled shortly after the ''Maximus'' arrived and the ''Ojai'' docked with the Phoenix to recover the satellites.

Later, it met with [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Jeffrey]]'' in the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] to deliver the satellites. An Imperial force consisting of four [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]], escorted by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] attacked the rendezvous but were defeated by [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] flown by Farlander and [[Puck Naeco/Legends|Puck Naeco]], allowing the transfer to take place.

The ''Jeffrey'' then replaced several Imperial satellites with the Rebel ones to monitor Imperial communications and report to listening post [[AX-235]]. The satellites proved essential in discovering the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] project.
